body:
Opus review of e9cb8e6 (Stage 2.1 vidar-coder landing) found the scaffold was structurally broken in ways the acceptance criteria false-positived past:

(1) Top-level cli/internal/server/graphql/generated.go line 119 had var sources = []*ast.Source{} — generated from an EMPTY schema. Only 2447 lines. Manual {__typename} test passed because gqlparser tolerates zero sources and returns builtin Query type.
(2) Nested orphan cli/internal/server/graphql/internal/server/graphql/ had the REAL 34,433-line generated output from the 1908-line schema.graphql, but was unreachable because the server imports ddxgraphql "github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/server/graphql" (the top-level empty one).
(3) Stray cli/graphqlgen/ — another empty-schema dup at a wrong package path.

Root cause: gqlgen.yml had exec.filename=./internal/server/graphql/generated.go which when run from cli/internal/server/graphql/ produced the nested path.

This scaffold is load-bearing for all Stage 2.2+ resolver beads. Shipped as-is it would have either built against empty types or entrenched the wrong import path.

REJECT -> escalated to deterministic human fix rather than another LLM retry. The fix is mechanical (delete bad dirs + regenerate from correct cwd + fix 1 typo) and outside LLM strengths.
summary: REJECT: shipped 3 disconnected GraphQL packages (empty-schema top-level + nested orphan + stray cli/graphqlgen); manual __typename test was a false positive on zero-source gqlparser builtins

body:
Fix applied per opus REJECT review:

1. Deleted cli/graphqlgen/ (stray)
2. Deleted cli/internal/server/graphql/internal/ (nested orphan tree)
3. Fixed cli/internal/server/graphql/gqlgen.yml: filenames are now just generated.go / resolver.go / models.go (no subdirectory prefix), so paths resolve relative to the config file location
4. Ran go run github.com/99designs/gqlgen generate from cli/internal/server/graphql/ cwd
5. Top-level now has real output: generated.go (32537 lines), resolver.go (302 lines with panic stubs for every query/mutation/subscription field), models.go (1362 lines with Bead/Project/Document/Worker domain types)
6. Fixed cli/internal/server/server.go handler: use &ddxgraphql.Resolver{} (pointer) as required by the regenerated ResolverRoot interface
7. Fixed GraphiQL HTML: replaced "browser graphiql.js" (space typo) with graphiql@3/graphiql.min.js CDN

go build ./... clean. go vet ./... clean. gofmt clean (pre-commit hook).

APPROVE, bead stays closed. Stage 2.2 can proceed against the real scaffold.
summary: Scaffold fixed in commit 36c97df: 3 bad dirs deleted, real 32537-line generated.go regenerated, pointer receiver + GraphiQL URL typo fixed, build clean
